info.name: AsyncAI Pipeline
info.description:
AsyncAI Pipeline is a Django REST Framework backend for submitting text-processing jobs and handling them asynchronously using Celery and Redis.

The system supports JWT authentication, job submission, job status tracking, result retrieval, retry handling, structured error history, and graceful failure states. It simulates AI-style processing tasks such as summarization, sentiment analysis, and tag generation using lightweight mock processors so the project can run locally without any third-party AI APIs.

Core features:

- User registration and JWT login
    
- Protected job APIs
    
- Asynchronous task execution with Celery
    
- Redis as Celery message broker
    
- Job lifecycle tracking: pending, in_progress, retrying, completed, failed
    
- Retry handling with structured error history
    
- Result retrieval after processing completes

item.name: Auth

request.description:
Creates a new user account and returns the created user's basic details.

Use the login endpoint after registration to get access and refresh tokens.

response.name: Validation Error

request.description: Authenticates a user and returns JWT refresh and access tokens.

response.name: Unauthorized Error

request.description: Returns details of the currently authenticated user.
Generates a new access token using a valid refresh token.

item.description: Authentication APIs for registering users, logging in with JWT, refreshing access tokens, and retrieving the currently authenticated user.

item.name: Jobs

response.name: Job Submitted
response.body:
{
    "id": 12,
    "task_type": "summarization",
    "input_text": "Put simply, technology is advancing at a faster rate than anyone expected, driven by rapid progress in artificial intelligence, machine learning, and other cutting-edge domains. For example, generative AI (like Google's Gemini models) has seen a surge in development and investment, with applications that now outperform human experts in certain benchmarks and dramatically improve capabilities like programming and scientific research, within ethical reason. The pace of these advancements is reshaping industries, with AI being integrated into everything from healthcare to agriculture and route optimisation on a global scale. And it's not even creating new content yet, it's just mimicking and echoing the large sea of data that's already out there!.",
    "status": "pending",
    "progress": 0,
    "celery_task_id": "b5e5352c-e0de-422e-b06e-5dba5d9fa7ce"
}

request.description:
Returns a list of jobs submitted by the authenticated user.

This endpoint is useful for viewing all submitted jobs without loading full input/result details.

Returns full details for a specific job.  
Requires authentication. Users can only access their own jobs.

request.description:
Returns the current processing status of a specific job.  
  
Possible statuses:  
\- pending: job created but not yet picked up  
\- in_progress: worker is actively processing the job  
\- retrying: previous attempt failed and another retry is scheduled  
\- completed: processing finished successfully  
\- failed: all retry attempts failed  
  
Also returns progress, retry count, latest error message, error history, and updated timestamp.  
  
This endpoint is intended for polling while the background task is running.

response.name: Status: Retrying
Status: Retry Attempt In Progress
Status: Failed

request.description:
Returns the final result for a specific job.

- If the job is completed, this endpoint returns the processed result.
    
- If the job is still pending, in_progress, or retrying, it returns \`result: null\` with a message saying the result is not available yet.
    
- If the job failed, it returns failure information including the latest error message and error history.

response.name: Result Available
Result Not Available Yet
response.body:
{
    "id": 14,
    "status": "in_progress",
    "result": null,
    "latest_error_message": null,
    "error_history": [],
    "message": "Result is not available yet."
}

item.description: Job management APIs for submitting text-processing tasks, listing submitted jobs, checking job details, tracking processing status, and retrieving final results.
